chapter: D. NEURONAL MIGRATION ANOMALY due to infection, ischemia, metabolic disorders

differentials.name: Congenitally absent / small ICA
differentials.raw: Congenitally absent / small ICA (small / absent carotid canal)

context: √  nonstenotic luminal irregularity DDx:  arterial spasm √  linear intraluminal filling defect emanating from arterial wall √  eccentric / circumferential mural thickening: √  narrowed arterial lumen √  increased arterial diameter √  lack of intraluminal enhancement √  eccentric outpouching from native arterial lumen: √  minimal contour abnormality √  large irregular saccular outpouching √  focal ballooning of arterial lumen √  irregular collection of extravascular contrast material surrounding parent vessel √  early venous enhancement during the arterial phase √  enlargement of draining vein
